findings.title: In-process cancelledJobIds Set not cleared on the setJobState 'failed' terminal transition
findings.evidence: Invariant comment at job-store.ts:72-74 claims entries are cleared at every terminal state; only completeJob (369) and resetRunningJobsForKind (397-400) delete. setJobState (234-263) does not, and the background dispatch routes failures through setJobState(jobId,'failed') (memory-index.ts:1525,1532). A cancel-requested job that then fails leaks its id permanently.
findings.suggestedFix: Delete from cancelledJobIds on every terminal transition (e.g. inside setJobState when isTerminalJobState(nextState), or in the two failed-path branches).
